creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Thu Mar 20 02:41:58 2014
New Revision: 348658
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/348658
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r348658/

Log:
  The kafo_parser gem can parse values, validations, documentation, types, groups
  and conditions of parameters from your puppet modules.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/theforeman/kafo_parsers
  
  PR:		ports/187775
  Submitted by:	Michael Moll <kvedulv at kvedulv.de>

Added:
  head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/
  head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/files/
  head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/files/patch-gemspec   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Thu Mar 20 00:09:25 2014	(r348657)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Thu Mar 20 02:41:58 2014	(r348658)
@@ -4254,6 +4254,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-json
     SUBDIR += rubygem-json146
     SUBDIR += rubygem-json_pure
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-kafo_parsers
     SUBDIR += rubygem-kgio
     SUBDIR += rubygem-launchy
     SUBDIR += rubygem-librarian

Added: head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/Makefile	Thu Mar 20 02:41:58 2014	(r348658)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Created by: Michael Moll <kvedulv at kvedulv.de>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	kafo_parsers
+PORTVERSION=	0.0.1
+CATEGORIES=	devel ruby
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
+COMMENT=	Parser for puppet modules
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	puppet:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/puppet \
+		rubygem-rdoc>=3.9.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-rdoc
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/distinfo	Thu Mar 20 02:41:58 2014	(r348658)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/kafo_parsers-0.0.1.gem) = 2655a041fcbfedfc99b102a2152080bf9a7dfaeb9b36de610f7d48152ad18e1f
+SIZE (rubygem/kafo_parsers-0.0.1.gem) = 7680

Added: head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/files/patch-gemspec
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/files/patch-gemspec	Thu Mar 20 02:41:58 2014	(r348658)
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+--- kafo_parsers-0.0.1.gemspec.orig	2014-03-19 14:32:20.000000000 +0100
++++ kafo_parsers-0.0.1.gemspec	2014-03-19 14:32:49.000000000 +0100
+@@ -81,20 +81,6 @@
+       - !ruby/object:Gem::Version
+         version: '0'
+ - !ruby/object:Gem::Dependency
+-  name: puppet
+-  requirement: !ruby/object:Gem::Requirement
+-    requirements:
+-    - - '>='
+-      - !ruby/object:Gem::Version
+-        version: '0'
+-  type: :runtime
+-  prerelease: false
+-  version_requirements: !ruby/object:Gem::Requirement
+-    requirements:
+-    - - '>='
+-      - !ruby/object:Gem::Version
+-        version: '0'
+-- !ruby/object:Gem::Dependency
+   name: rdoc
+   requirement: !ruby/object:Gem::Requirement
+     requirements:

Added: head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers/pkg-descr	Thu Mar 20 02:41:58 2014	(r348658)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+The kafo_parser gem can parse values, validations, documentation, types, groups
+and conditions of parameters from your puppet modules.
+
+WWW: https://github.com/theforeman/kafo_parsers
